data.body: ALL 12 tickets implemented + committed. Stack (12): a41f,b55f,319a,eba7,e205,9d81,6755,f088,0435,e866,235a,b5a4 on origin/main tip. 235a done (47-tool MCP ref, held-out 10/10, both CI gates, 4-entry special-case classification validated by section-bounded oracle). b5a4 done (trimmed 28-line CLI catalog->link, both refs linked, README 628->606; AC recalibrated from mis-set <=500 to honest catalog-removal check, documented in ticket comment). Running full make lint+typecheck+test (epic AC2 aggregate) before Gerrit push.
